title: MacroPulse Alert
message:
BTC BVIV 30d implied vol at 34–38% historical floor — zone that preceded 3 prior sharp selloffs; covered-call ETF supply keeping vol 'cheap' (CoinDesk, Jul 20).
This week: Alphabet + Tesla earnings Wed after close; ECB rate decision Thu (hold at 2.25% 84% priced — press conf tone key for EUR/risk).
